title: rubus jianensis
intro: Rubus jianensis, also known as the Jian raspberry, is a type of plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, which is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus jianensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
